title: Sealapack SAP1070 Bag Clips, Plastic
features: CLIP TO SAVE: FRESHER 4 LONGER SECURE CLIPS: Sealapack Easy Grip Storage Clips, brightly coloured, easy to use in the home, office or garage. Securely seal open packs of cereal,bread, fruit, pulses, pasta - anything in a packet
FRESHER 4 LONGER: Create a tight seal to keep open food and ingredient packets secure and air tight to keep moisture and air out, leaving the contents fresher 4 longer
EASY TO USE: Quickly need to seal an open bag? These bright clips are easy to store and find in a kitchen drawer for a fast clip and seal solution
FREEZER SAFE: Perfect to seal open bags of frozen venetables, herbs, smoothie fruit mixes and open packets of bread
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: PACK OF 6 MULTI-COLOUR CLIPS
